data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 818,474 UNI from Cumberland
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 818,474 UNI from Cumberland, worth US$4.21 million. The wallet withdrew 32,708 AAVE 19 hours ago, worth US$4.51 million.

data.title: Coinbase executive: Singapore should launch a national digital asset strategy and set up a digital asset working group
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Hassan Ahmed, head of Coinbase Singapore, wrote that Singapore should launch a national digital asset strategy, set up a digital asset working group, allow sovereign funds to establish strategic Bitcoin positions, relax the threshold for domestic retail investors to participate in the cryptocurrency market, double investment in research and development and skills improvement, establish a tokenized regulatory laboratory, and put cryptocurrency native participants at the forefront.

data.title: Raydium launches LaunchLab token issuance platform
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Raydium announced the launch of LaunchLab, a token issuance platform built for creators, developers and communities, to issue tokens through the JustSendIt model.

data.title: The three major U.S. stock indexes opened sharply lower, and gold stocks rose across the board
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow fell 0.47%, the S&P 500 fell 1.17%, and the Nasdaq fell 1.89%. Gold stocks generally rose, Harmony Gold (HMY.N) rose more than 7%, Anglogold rose 6%, and AMD (AMD.O) fell more than 7%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Mantra Addresses Unexpected OM Token Price Drop
data.description:
According to Odaily, Mantra has issued a statement regarding the unexpected significant drop in the price of its OM token. The statement clarifies that the Mantra team has not engaged in any selling activities. The funds of the Mantra mainnet OM team and advisory team remain 100% locked, while the ERC-20 tokens are publicly circulating and not under team control. Currently, 77
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/22995570258146?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Gold Stocks Surge in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: According to Odaily, gold stocks experienced significant gains in pre-market trading. Harmony Gold saw an increase of over 8%, Gold Fields rose nearly 8%, Anglogold climbed 6%, and Coeur Mining advanced more than 4%. These movements reflect a positive trend in the sector.

data.title: OKX Relaunches in America After $504M DOJ Settlement
data.description:
OKX has officially re-entered the U. S. market with a new headquarters in San Jose and a renewed focus on compliance.

The post OKX Relaunches in America After $504M DOJ Settlement first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/16/okx-returns-to-the-u-s-market/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=okx-returns-to-the-u-s-market

data.title:
NEW: US Treasury bonds partially backed by Bitcoin could help refinance $14 trillion in US debt - VanEck

🧐
China Intensifies Surveillance, Arrests Tibetans for Phone and Internet Use
data.description:
A new report highlights a disturbing trend in China — the increasing surveillance and arrests of Tibetans for offenses related to their phone and internet activity. According to Human Rights Watch, at least 60 Tibetans have been arrested since 2021, a figure that is likely higher due to the government’s lack of transparency. The crackdown is part of a broader tightening of control in Tibet, where even basic cell phone use is now considered risky. Maya Wang, associate China director at Human Rights Watch, explained that while cell phones were once welcomed by Tibetans in remote areas for maintaining connections, they have now “effectively become government tracking devices
source: https://medium.com/pivx/china-intensifies-surveillance-arrests-tibetans-for-phone-and-internet-use-89bfa18a134d?source=rss----430d9242e45e---4
